hero.title: Take your company to New Digital Orbits.
hero.description: Blast off with our technology solutions, original software, and specialized support, designed to boost your productivity, protect your investment, and conquer every technological challenge successfully.

about.text: Whether you are looking to upgrade your workstation, acquire software licenses, or maintain your systems, at Vanguardia Tecnología we design tailor-made solutions.

services.title: Expert technology.
services.description: We help businesses and professionals conquer their goals with reliable technical support, preventive maintenance, and custom development. From system optimization to custom applications, our expert crew delivers real results that drive your mission.

0.title: Orbit Support - Remote Assistance
0.desc: We solve technical problems immediately through a secure connection, without travel or unnecessary wait times.

1.title: Software Module - Installation & Configuration
1.desc: We install and configure specialized software ensuring compatibility, security, and optimal performance on your equipment.

2.title: Space Shield - Preventive Maintenance & Optimization
2.desc: We keep your systems in perfect condition with cleaning, optimization, and updates that extend their useful life.

3.title: Stellar Rescue - Data Recovery
3.desc: We recover accidentally deleted files from hard drives, USBs, and SD cards using advanced and secure techniques.

4.title: Command Center - Management & Support Systems
4.desc: We implement business management systems with unlimited support for total control of your digital operations.

5.title: Digital Galaxy - Custom Development
5.desc: We create custom plugins, web systems, and mobile applications designed specifically for your business needs.

maintenance.title: Safe Orbit Maintenance
maintenance.desc1: Taking off is not enough; staying in orbit is also necessary. That is why we offer preventive and corrective maintenance services that ensure your equipment always functions at 100%. Our work includes cleaning, optimization, and technical adjustments that extend the life of your technology.
maintenance.desc2: With Vanguardia Tecnología, your technological investment remains calibrated like a ship ready to face any mission without setbacks.

team.title: Vanguardia Tecnología Crew
team.desc1: Whether you are looking to update your workstation, acquire software licenses, or maintain your systems, at Vanguardia Tecnología we design solutions tailored to your needs. We work with precision and commitment, like an interplanetary journey that requires maximum coordination.
team.desc2: With us, your technology will always be ready to take off to the next level.
team.desc3: At Vanguardia Tecnología, we are passionate about technology and believe that every client deserves the same care and attention as a space mission. Our vision is to be your trusted technology partner, boosting your operations with innovative and reliable solutions.
